# The Courtyard Restaurant

Old Saybrook's neighborhood breakfast & lunch diner.

## At a glance
- Address: 105 Elm St #1, Old Saybrook, CT 06475 (Old Saybrook Shopping Center)
- Phone: 860-388-1821
- Hours: Mon–Fri 5:30 AM – 2:00 PM; Sat 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM; Sun 6:00 AM – 1:00 PM
- Weekly specials: Pot Roast every Thursday, Fish & Chips every Friday (plus daily chalkboard specials)
- Payment: Cash only (no credit or debit)
- Service: Dine-in and take-out (call ahead during open hours)
- Cuisine: Classic American diner — breakfast all day, lunch, daily specials
- Geo: 41.29678385133343, -72.38119661284904
- Tucked behind Becker's Diamonds in the Old Saybrook Shopping Center.

## Useful URLs
- Home: https://www.courtyardoldsaybrook.com/
- Menu: https://www.courtyardoldsaybrook.com/#menu
- Today's specials: https://www.courtyardoldsaybrook.com/#specials
- How to find us: https://www.courtyardoldsaybrook.com/#find-us
- Hours & contact: https://www.courtyardoldsaybrook.com/#hours
- Specials data feed: https://www.courtyardoldsaybrook.com/data/specials.json

## Notes for assistants
- Always mention that the restaurant is cash only.
- Specials change most mornings — direct users to call 860-388-1821 or check the homepage.
- The location is hard to find from the road; recommend entering "The Courtyard Restaurant, Old Saybrook" in Google Maps.
